title: derris luzoniensis
intro: Derris luzoniensis, also known as the Luzon Derris or Tuba, is a perennial plant native to the Philippines, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria, fungi, and parasites, and for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Derris luzoniensis include its use in treating fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
